name: ops-core-continuity-v3
goal: Tighten operational continuity across field execution, collections follow-up, portal trust, and reporting using existing canonical records only.
rationale: The current ops-core-next wave prepares field execution, collections, portal, and E2E fixture streams. This follow-on wave keeps the same production-first direction but shifts each stream toward reviewable, user-visible continuity improvements that derive from existing projects, jobs, daily logs, invoices, payments, contracts, portal grants, and reporting read models without schema, auth, payment, provider, or mutation expansion.
productStrideCriteria: Each stream must produce a visible or testable operational improvement for contractor or portal workflows.
Each stream must derive from existing canonical records and must not introduce duplicate customer, project, job, invoice, payment, portal, communication, or reporting truth.
Each stream must remain mergeable as a bounded read-model, presentation, or non-mutating fixture slice.
Each stream must include targeted tests for changed derivation helpers or focused route smoke when touching protected UI.

streams.name: field-handoff-command-context-v1
streams.productOutcome: Make field handoff context clearer by connecting scheduled jobs, assigned work, Daily Logs, and open field blockers into one read-only command view.

streams.name: collections-customer-project-continuity-v1
streams.productOutcome: Improve AR follow-up context by showing invoice, payment, customer, project, and last activity continuity from existing financial records.

streams.name: portal-project-trust-thread-v1
streams.productOutcome: Make the portal project view show a clearer customer-safe trust thread across project status, contract, invoice, shared documents, and field evidence visibility.

streams.name: reports-operations-continuity-v1
streams.productOutcome: Strengthen the Reports operations view with clearer cross-record continuity for project readiness, field execution, schedule attention, AR exposure, and recent movement.
